cache.help: Speeds up queries through local payment cache, but can extend initial loading time.
cache.label: Use cache (Beta)
cache.prefetchHelp: Lead time of entries/transactions to be loaded in days (einmalig beim ersten Aktivieren)

network.title: Network
network.desc: Optional: Full-History Horizon for Deep History
network.autoUseFull: Automatically use if necessary (when From-Date is older than server history)
network.historyInfo: The free Horizon servers operated by the Stellar Development Foundation provide only about one year of history. For older data, you either need to operate your own Horizon node or rely on third-party/paid services.

description: Currently, there are no settings available.
label: Settings

multisig.timeoutHint: Validity period for multisig payments in seconds (e.g., 86400 = 24 hours).

explorer.description: Choose the default explorer for account links and manage the explorer list.
explorer.testnetUrlPlaceholder: https://…{address} (leave blank to use the mainnet URL for the testnet as well)

validation.testnetUrlInvalid: Please enter a valid testnet URL.

import.title: Import settings
import.hint: Select a previously exported settings file (.json).

error.invalid: Import failed: file is invalid or could not be read.
error.invalidType: Import failed: Unexpected format in the file.

trustedWallets.desc: This list is stored locally in the browser. Default file: QSI_TrustedWallets.json

editor.invalidFormat: Invalid format. An object with the field "wallets" (Array) is expected.

file.hint: Import a JSON file in the format { wallets: [...] }
file.label: File

trustedWallets.title: My Trusted Wallets

validation.hint: At least one line is invalid (missing or duplicate address).

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.replaceHint: Replace the file at src/locales/{{lang}}/{{file}} and redeploy the app.
maintenance.invalidFile: Invalid file format. Please use .xlsx or .csv.

inputHistory.title: Saved inputs
inputHistory.description: Deletes locally saved suggestions for wallets, payment recipients, amounts, and memos.
inputHistory.confirm: Clear all saved inputs? This removes the history entries for all text fields.
inputHistory.done: Text field histories have been cleared.

paymentCache.title: Payment cache
paymentCache.description: Deletes the locally cached payment history (including memos, stored encrypted). Data is reloaded from Horizon as needed.
paymentCache.confirm: Really clear the local payment cache? Data will be re-synced as needed.
